paragraphs.cn: Ya, karena wilayah udara akan ditutup.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: The airspace will be shut down. But leave Washington.
paragraphs.cn: Wilayah udara akan ditutup. Tapi tinggalkan Washington.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: It doesn't feel the tiniest bit defeatist to you to just say, welp, states, it's your turn because we couldn't do it.
paragraphs.cn: Apakah Anda tidak berpikir mengatakan 'Baiklah, negara bagian, giliran Anda, karena kami tidak bisa' sedikit defeatist?

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: No, no, I -- laboratories of democracy.
paragraphs.cn: Tidak, tidak, saya -- -- laboratorium demokrasi.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: But I think people are tired of Donald Trump's chaos and tired of all of this -- the antics anyways. And so I think that people have turned to their communities writ large the last year anyway. So, I think --
paragraphs.cn: Tapi saya pikir orang sudah bosan dengan kekacauan Donald Trump, bosan dengan semua ini -- -- setidaknya tingkah laku konyol itu. Jadi saya pikir selama setahun terakhir, orang telah beralih ke komunitas mereka. Jadi, saya pikir -- --

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Yes. Or to the Taylor Swift wedding.
paragraphs.cn: Ya. Atau beralih ke pernikahan Taylor Swift.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: And so I think people are paying attention to what's going on in their communities. They'll enjoy their own parades and their own fireworks. And that's what's so great about our country.
paragraphs.cn: Jadi saya pikir orang memperhatikan apa yang terjadi di komunitas mereka. Mereka akan menikmati parade dan kembang api mereka sendiri. Itulah kehebatan negara kita.

paragraphs.speaker: I -- Cornish
paragraphs.en: And maybe that is a good thing for celebration of colonial independence.
paragraphs.cn: Mungkin ini hal yang baik untuk merayakan kemerdekaan kolonial.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: We're resilient. We're resilient.
paragraphs.cn: Kami tangguh. Kami tangguh.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Shout out to the colonies.
paragraphs.cn: Salut untuk koloni.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: Meghan's right, Donald Trump, community builder.
paragraphs.cn: Megan benar, Donald Trump, pembangun komunitas.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: Oh, OK. Yes. That's --
paragraphs.cn: Oh, baiklah. Ya. Itu -- --

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Is that what's in your group chat? We're doing group chats next.
paragraphs.cn: Itu yang ada di grup chat Anda? Kita akan bicara tentang grup chat selanjutnya.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: So, in my group chat is McDonald's in honor of America's 250, has brought back the fried apple pie.
paragraphs.cn: Jadi, di grup chat saya, McDonald's meluncurkan kembali apple pie goreng untuk merayakan 250 tahun Amerika.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Oh, my God, you are the second person in the group chat to bring up this fried apple creation.
paragraphs.cn: Ya ampun, kamu orang kedua di grup yang menyebut apple pie goreng itu.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: No, it's -- they got rid of it. They got rid of it in 1992. It's now back.
paragraphs.cn: Bukan, itu -- mereka sudah menghentikannya. Berhenti pada 1992. Sekarang kembali lagi.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: And it is also so delicious.
paragraphs.cn: Dan rasanya enak banget.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: But, you know, I love fast food almost as much as I love Bravo. So, that is why I'm talking about McDonald's fried apple pie. It is so good. I had it last night.
paragraphs.cn: Tapi, kamu tahu, aku suka makanan cepat saji hampir sama seperti aku suka Bravo. Jadi itu kenapa aku bicara soal apple pie goreng McDonald's. Enak banget. Aku makan tadi malam.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Shout out. I hope, I hope you can get spawn con (ph) of that. I hope the next time you come here you just have like an arm full of breakfast for us.
paragraphs.cn: Teriak keras. Aku harap, aku harap kamu bisa dapat itu. Aku harap lain kali kamu datang, kamu bisa bawakan kami banyak sarapan.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: I should have -- I should have brought you one. I'm sorry.
paragraphs.cn: Aku seharusnya -- seharusnya bawain kamu satu. Maaf.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: They are very good. And they burn. They burn. You got to wait. Wait.
paragraphs.cn: Enak banget. Tapi panas. Panas. Kamu harus tunggu. Tunggu.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: For those that haven't had these as children, wait to eat the fried apple pie.
paragraphs.cn: Buat yang belum pernah makan ini waktu kecil, tunggu dulu sebelum makan apple pie goreng.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: We do not need pro tips. They sell them to you. Go on.
paragraphs.cn: Kami tidak perlu tips profesional. Mereka jual aja. Lanjutkan.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: No, I -- but it hurts. It's like the coffee. It burns you.
paragraphs.cn: Enggak, aku -- tapi bisa bikin luka bakar. Kayak kopi. Bisa bikin kamu kepanasan.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Well, that's good anyway. Now we have to apologize to McDonald's instead of thanking them. Go on.
paragraphs.cn: Yah, itu hal yang baik. Sekarang kita harus minta maaf ke McDonald's, bukan berterima kasih. Lanjutkan.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: So, I tried to think of a public policy thing to tie this next -- my group chat into.
paragraphs.cn: Jadi, aku coba pikir topik kebijakan publik untuk menghubungkan ke -- isi grup chat saya selanjutnya.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: Which is, there's a Norwegian study out that in Norway they have given eighth graders tablets. So, nobody's reading books anymore. And what they've found is that the retention level of the students is subpar to the rest of students in Europe because they're not reading books. And the reason I bring that up is because I was told that I had to watch "Off Campus."
paragraphs.cn: Yaitu, ada studi di Norwegia yang menunjukkan bahwa di Norwegia, mereka memberi siswa kelas 8 tablet. Jadi, tidak ada yang baca buku lagi. Mereka menemukan bahwa tingkat retensi pengetahuan siswa lebih rendah dibanding siswa Eropa lainnya karena mereka tidak baca buku. Aku sebut ini karena seseorang bilang aku harus nonton serial 'The Outing'.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: I was told by you that I had to watch "Off Campus."
paragraphs.cn: Kamu yang bilang aku harus nonton 'The Outing'.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: Yes, "Off Campus." Not on an airplane. Not on an airplane.
paragraphs.cn: Iya, 'The Outing'. Bukan di pesawat. Bukan di pesawat.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: The college romance streaming right now on Amazon.
paragraphs.cn: Serial drama cinta kampus yang sekarang tayang di Amazon.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: But not on an -- yes, but not on -- but not on an airplane, where I binge watch most of my stuff --
paragraphs.cn: Tapi bukan di -- iya, tapi bukan di -- tapi bukan di pesawat, aku biasanya nonton serial di pesawat --

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: No, not on an airplane.
paragraphs.cn: Enggak, bukan di pesawat.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: Because it's a little risque and I'd have to put my screen down.
paragraphs.cn: Karena agak vulgar, aku harus menurunkan layar.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: So, I started to watch it, and it became -- I had to turn it off halfway through.
paragraphs.cn: Jadi, aku mulai nonton, tapi harus berhenti di tengah.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: It was too hot for me. It was -- it was --
paragraphs.cn: Kepanasan buatku. Ini -- ini --

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: The prude of the group chat.
paragraphs.cn: Sok suci di grup chat.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: So what -- so what I realized was, this had to be a series of books because it was so ridiculous. And it was.
paragraphs.cn: Jadi aku sadar, ini pasti seri buku, karena terlalu konyol. Dan ternyata memang begitu.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: And it had to be by a Canadian author because there was a hockey fetish in it.
paragraphs.cn: Dan penulisnya harus orang Kanada, karena buku ini memiliki nuansa hoki es.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: There's eight books, I've learned.
paragraphs.cn: Saya tahu, total ada delapan buku.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: This is the book. This is -- this is the deal. This is the beginning of the series.
paragraphs.cn: Ini bukunya. Ini -- -- ini dia. Ini adalah awal dari seri ini.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: Can I borrow it? I'll read it.
paragraphs.cn: Boleh saya pinjam? Saya akan membacanya.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: Oh, no, you don't have to borrow it.
paragraphs.cn: Oh, tidak, kamu tidak perlu meminjam.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: You'll just read the steamy parts.
paragraphs.cn: Kamu hanya akan membaca bagian-bagian yang panas.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: This is my gift to you.
paragraphs.cn: Ini hadiah untukmu.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: So, this is summer reading for you.
paragraphs.cn: Jadi, ini bacaan musim panasmu.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: OK. This is number one?
paragraphs.cn: Oke, ini yang pertama?

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: Because -- this is number one.
paragraphs.cn: Karena -- -- ini yang pertama.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: I want you to start at the beginning. But I want you to take that to the beach.
paragraphs.cn: Saya ingin kamu mulai dari awal, tapi saya ingin kamu membawanya ke pantai.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Mike, all I've learned is not to send you like an eggplant emoji or something like that in the group chat.
paragraphs.cn: Mike, yang saya pelajari adalah jangan kirim emoji terong atau semacamnya di chat grup.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: It seems like you were puzzled -- you were puzzled by a lot of the modern detailed.
paragraphs.cn: Kamu tampak bingung -- -- kamu bingung dengan banyak detail modern.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: Now I have a book club.
paragraphs.cn: Sekarang saya punya klub buku.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: I am not puzzled. I am not puzzled.
paragraphs.cn: Saya tidak bingung. Saya tidak bingung.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: Group chat book club.
paragraphs.cn: Klub buku chat grup.

paragraphs.speaker: Dubke
paragraphs.en: Book club. Yes, group chat book club.
paragraphs.cn: Klub buku. Ya, klub buku chat grup.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: The Dubke Hays book club.
paragraphs.cn: Klub buku Dubuque Hayes.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: We got it. Coming to Norway soon.
paragraphs.cn: Kami menerimanya. Segera tiba di Norwegia.

paragraphs.speaker: Hays
paragraphs.en: Thank you. That's so sweet.
paragraphs.cn: Terima kasih. Kamu baik sekali.

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: Thank you for waking up with us. I'm Audie Cornish. var CNN = CNN || {};
paragraphs.cn: Terima kasih telah bangun bersama kami. Saya Audi Cornish. var CNN = CNN || {};

vocabulary.cn: 披露报告（财务公开文件）
vocabulary.en: a formal document revealing financial details
vocabulary.excerpt: a new disclosure report shows that Trump pulled in billions last year
vocabulary.exampleCn: 一份新的披露报告显示特朗普去年赚了数十亿美元。

vocabulary.en: a secondary job or business that brings in extra income
vocabulary.excerpt: Then there are the side hustles. That's $4 million for Trump-branded watches
vocabulary.exampleCn: 还有那些副业：特朗普品牌手表赚了400万美元。

vocabulary.en: short for cryptocurrency
vocabulary.excerpt: There's more than $1 billion in cryptocurrency ventures
vocabulary.exampleCn: 加密货币投资超过10亿美元。

vocabulary.en: a range of investments or products held by a person or company
vocabulary.excerpt: it details a vast portfolio of money-making operations
vocabulary.exampleCn: 它详细列出了庞大的赚钱业务组合。

vocabulary.en: payment to a creator or owner for the use of their property
vocabulary.excerpt: the royalties. His properties also generated another $77 million
vocabulary.exampleCn: 版税。他的房产又产生了7700万美元。

vocabulary.en: a very enthusiastic and loyal supporter
vocabulary.excerpt: this cash haul makes even some of his most ardent supporters queasy
vocabulary.exampleCn: 这笔巨额收入甚至让他最坚定的支持者感到不安。

vocabulary.en: feeling uneasy or nauseated
vocabulary.excerpt: makes even some of his most ardent supporters queasy
vocabulary.exampleCn: 让他最坚定的支持者感到不安。

vocabulary.en: characterized by dishonest schemes to make money
vocabulary.excerpt: It's so grifty. I'm not going to lie. It's grifty.
vocabulary.exampleCn: 这太骗钱了。我不撒谎，就是骗钱。

vocabulary.cn: 转移话题（以'那又怎样'反驳批评）
vocabulary.en: a rhetorical technique of responding to criticism by raising a different issue
vocabulary.excerpt: And the whataboutism to follow?
vocabulary.exampleCn: 接下来是转移话题吗？

vocabulary.cn: 肮脏；不道德行为（尤指政治腐败）
vocabulary.en: dishonest or immoral behavior, especially in politics
vocabulary.excerpt: Hunter Biden sleaze -- -style sleaze is just as slimy when the Trump boys do it
vocabulary.exampleCn: 亨特·拜登式的肮脏，当特朗普的孩子们做同样的事时也一样令人恶心。

vocabulary.en: in a way that increases very rapidly
vocabulary.excerpt: The presidency is making Trump exponentially richer.
vocabulary.exampleCn: 总统职位让特朗普急剧变得更富有。

vocabulary.en: to figure out or understand something
vocabulary.excerpt: What's important here that I'm trying to suss out is why this term
vocabulary.exampleCn: 我试图弄清楚的重要问题是为什么用这个词。

vocabulary.en: in an open and obvious way, without concealment
vocabulary.excerpt: things that he is so nakedly making policy directives about
vocabulary.exampleCn: 他如此赤裸裸地制定政策指令的事情。

vocabulary.en: the quality of being open and honest about actions and decisions
vocabulary.excerpt: That's transparency. And then, if you have transparency, what are you going to get upset about?
vocabulary.exampleCn: 那就是透明度。如果你有透明度，你还会生气什么呢？

vocabulary.en: the way something appears to the public
vocabulary.excerpt: I think the optics here are really terrible for the American people.
vocabulary.exampleCn: 我认为这对美国人民来说观感非常糟糕。

vocabulary.en: a dishonest scheme to make money
vocabulary.excerpt: But this is a grift, and I think everyone sees it as a grift.
vocabulary.exampleCn: 但这就是个骗局，我认为每个人都看出来了。

vocabulary.en: causing harm or loss to someone or something
vocabulary.excerpt: get richer at the expense of the American people
vocabulary.exampleCn: 以美国人民为代价变得更富有。

vocabulary.en: the responsibility to supervise or monitor something
vocabulary.excerpt: Congress could have oversight
vocabulary.exampleCn: 国会可以进行监督。

vocabulary.en: two things that are completely different and cannot be compared
vocabulary.excerpt: they are comparing apples and oranges here.
vocabulary.exampleCn: 他们在这里比较的是风马牛不相及的事物。

vocabulary.en: the total value of a person's assets minus liabilities
vocabulary.excerpt: When we look at the net worth of presidents after, that's where Trump is.
vocabulary.exampleCn: Ketika kita melihat kekayaan bersih presiden setelah menjabat, Trump berada di posisi itu.

vocabulary.en: an official order or instruction regarding policy
vocabulary.excerpt: things that he is so nakedly making policy directives about
vocabulary.exampleCn: Hal tentang dia yang begitu terang-terangan membuat kebijakan instruksi.

vocabulary.en: a large amount of money obtained, often suddenly
vocabulary.excerpt: this cash haul makes even some of his most ardent supporters queasy
vocabulary.exampleCn: Pemasukan besar ini bahkan membuat pendukungnya yang paling setia gelisah.

vocabulary.en: to reject or ignore worries or objections
vocabulary.excerpt: President Trump there, dismissing concerns that he is profiting off of his second term
vocabulary.exampleCn: Presiden Trump mengabaikan kekhawatiran bahwa dia mendapat keuntungan dari masa jabatan kedua.

vocabulary.en: very enthusiastic or passionate
vocabulary.excerpt: even some of his most ardent supporters
vocabulary.exampleCn: Bahkan beberapa pendukungnya yang paling antusias.

sentences.en: A new disclosure report shows that Trump pulled in billions last year.
sentences.cn: Sebuah laporan pengungkapan keuangan baru menunjukkan bahwa Trump menghasilkan miliaran dolar tahun lalu.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (A new disclosure report shows) + klausa objek (that Trump pulled in billions last year)
sentences.analysis: 'pulled in' adalah ekspresi informal yang berarti 'menghasilkan'; setelah 'billions' dihilangkan 'of dollars', hal ini umum dalam bahasa Inggris berita.

sentences.en: We are seeing the greatest onslaught of corruption in the history of mankind.
sentences.cn: Kita sedang menyaksikan serangan korupsi terburuk dalam sejarah umat manusia.
sentences.structure: Struktur Subjek-Predikat-Objek (We are seeing the greatest onslaught) + Pelengkap di belakang (of corruption) + Keterangan tempat (in the history of mankind)
sentences.analysis: onslaught berarti 'serangan gencar', di sini kiasan untuk 'muncul dalam jumlah besar'; the greatest...in the history of mankind adalah retorika berlebihan untuk menekankan tingkat keparahan.

sentences.en: President Trump there dismissing concerns that he is profiting off of his second term, even as disclosures show he's cashing in.
sentences.cn: Presiden Trump di sana membantah kekhawatiran bahwa dia mengambil keuntungan dari masa jabatan keduanya, meskipun pengungkapan menunjukkan dia sedang menghasilkan uang.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (President Trump dismissing concerns) + Klausa aposisi (that he is profiting off of his second term) + Klausa konsesif (even as disclosures show he's cashing in)
sentences.analysis: dismissing concerns adalah frasa partisip kini sebagai keterangan penyerta; profit off of berarti 'mengambil keuntungan dari'; cash in adalah bahasa gaul yang berarti 'menghasilkan uang'.

sentences.en: A new disclosure report totals more than 927 pages, so it details a vast portfolio of money-making operations.
sentences.cn: Laporan pengungkapan baru berjumlah lebih dari 927 halaman, merinci portofolio besar operasi menghasilkan uang.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (A new disclosure report totals more than 927 pages) + Klausa akibat (so it details a vast portfolio of money-making operations)
sentences.analysis: total sebagai kata kerja berarti 'berjumlah'; portfolio aslinya 'portofolio investasi', di sini berarti 'kumpulan bisnis'; money-making adalah kata sifat majemuk yang berarti 'menghasilkan uang'.

sentences.en: There's more than $1 billion in cryptocurrency ventures, and the royalties.
sentences.cn: Investasi mata uang kripto dan pendapatan royalti lebih dari $1 miliar.
sentences.structure: Konstruksi There be (There's more than $1 billion) + Keterangan tempat (in cryptocurrency ventures, and the royalties)
sentences.analysis: royalties berarti 'royalti', di sini mungkin merujuk pada pendapatan lisensi merek Trump; cryptocurrency ventures berarti 'usaha/investasi mata uang kripto'.

sentences.en: All in all, this cash haul makes even some of his most ardent supporters queasy.
sentences.cn: Singkatnya, pendapatan tunai besar ini membuat bahkan beberapa pendukungnya yang paling bersemangat merasa gelisah.
sentences.structure: Kata sisipan (All in all) + Klausa utama (this cash haul makes even some of his most ardent supporters queasy)
sentences.analysis: cash haul berarti 'pendapatan tunai'; ardent supporters berarti 'pendukung bersemangat'; queasy aslinya 'mual', di sini kiasan untuk 'gelisah'.

sentences.en: I say this as a true fan of theirs, but I didn't like it when Hunter Biden was doing it.
sentences.cn: Saya mengatakan ini sebagai penggemar sejati mereka, tapi saya tidak suka ketika Hunter Biden melakukannya saat itu.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (I say this) + Keterangan cara (as a true fan of theirs) + Klausa setara berlawanan (but I didn't like it) + Klausa waktu (when Hunter Biden was doing it)
sentences.analysis: as a true fan of theirs adalah frasa preposisi sebagai keterangan yang berarti 'sebagai...'; it merujuk pada perilaku 'mengambil keuntungan dari jabatan' yang disebut sebelumnya.

sentences.en: It does feel a little bit like, wait, what is going on?
sentences.cn: Ini memang terasa sedikit seperti, tunggu, apa yang terjadi?
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (It does feel a little bit like) + Kutipan langsung (wait, what is going on?)
sentences.analysis: does digunakan untuk menekankan kata kerja feel; a little bit like diikuti kutipan langsung, struktur umum dalam percakapan yang berarti 'agak seperti'.

sentences.en: The thing people have asked me the most is, what do we mean when we say, 'makes money'?
sentences.cn: Hal yang paling sering ditanyakan orang kepada saya adalah, apa yang kita maksud ketika kita mengatakan 'menghasilkan uang'?
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (The thing is) + Klausa relatif (people have asked me the most) + Klausa predikatif (what do we mean when we say, 'makes money'?)
sentences.analysis: the thing...is adalah pola umum yang diikuti klausa predikatif; people have asked me the most adalah klausa relatif tanpa kata hubung that.

sentences.en: Anytime another company comes to them and says, Look, we want to sell crypto with your face on it, they make money off of that.
sentences.cn: 每当另一家公司来找他们说，'看，我们想卖印有你头像的加密货币'，他们就从中赚钱。
sentences.structure: 时间状语从句（Anytime another company comes to them and says, Look, we want to sell crypto with your face on it）+ 主句（they make money off of that）
sentences.analysis: Anytime 引导时间状语从句，相当于 whenever；with your face on it 是介词短语作定语，修饰 crypto；make money off of 意为"从……赚钱"。

sentences.en: What's important here that I'm trying to suss out is why this term, and why things that he is so nakedly making policy directives about?
sentences.cn: 我试图弄清楚的重要问题是，为什么用这个词，以及为什么他如此赤裸裸地制定政策指令？
sentences.structure: 主语从句（What's important here that I'm trying to suss out）+ 系动词 is + 表语从句（why this term, and why things that he is so nakedly making policy directives about）
sentences.analysis: suss out 是口语，意为"弄清楚"；nakedly 意为"赤裸裸地"；making policy directives about 中 about 后省略了宾语，指代前文提到的"事情"。

sentences.en: I think after the first term, the president and the family took away, maybe, a lesson that Megyn Kelly and others have issue with.
sentences.cn: 我认为在第一任期后，总统和他的家人可能吸取了一个教训，而梅根·凯利等人对此有异议。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+ 宾语从句（after the first term, the president and the family took away, maybe, a lesson）+ 定语从句（that Megyn Kelly and others have issue with）
sentences.analysis: took away a lesson 意为"吸取教训"；have issue with 是固定搭配，意为"对……有异议"。

sentences.en: I think this is the lesson they learned, which is if we do everything out in the open and try not to hide anything, try not to have some naming rights deal or something that we don't talk about.
sentences.cn: 我认为这就是他们学到的教训：如果我们一切都公开，尽量不隐瞒任何事，尽量不做一些我们不谈论的冠名权交易之类的事。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think this is the lesson they learned）+ 非限制性定语从句（which is if we do everything out in the open and try not to hide anything, try not to have some naming rights deal or something that we don't talk about）
sentences.analysis: out in the open 意为"公开地"；naming rights deal 指"冠名权交易"；or something 是口语中表示列举未尽。

sentences.en: But I think the optics here are really terrible for the American people.
sentences.cn: 但我认为这对美国人民来说，观感真的很糟糕。
sentences.structure: 转折连词 But + 主句（I think the optics here are really terrible for the American people）
sentences.analysis: optics 本义"光学"，这里比喻"公众观感"，是政治新闻常用词。

sentences.en: He is just going to continue to do it and get richer at the expense of the American people.
sentences.cn: 他只会继续这样做，以牺牲美国人民为代价变得更富有。
sentences.structure: 主句（He is just going to continue to do it and get richer）+ 方式状语（at the expense of the American people）
sentences.analysis: at the expense of 意为"以……为代价"，是常用短语。

sentences.en: Congress could have oversight and spend the amount of time it spend digging into the money that the Hunter Biden made on a Burisma board into this.
sentences.cn: 国会可以进行监督，并花时间深入调查亨特·拜登在布瑞斯玛董事会赚的钱，就像他们花时间调查这件事一样。
sentences.structure: 主句（Congress could have oversight and spend the amount of time）+ 定语从句（it spend digging into the money）+ 定语从句（that the Hunter Biden made on a Burisma board）+ 状语（into this）
sentences.analysis: spend time (in) doing sth. 是固定搭配；dig into 意为"深入调查"；Burisma board 指乌克兰布瑞斯玛能源公司董事会。

sentences.en: We haven't even talked about the money his family is making.
sentences.cn: 我们甚至还没谈到他的家人在赚的钱。
sentences.structure: 主句（We haven't even talked about the money）+ 定语从句（his family is making）
sentences.analysis: his family is making 是省略关系代词 that 的定语从句，修饰 the money。

sentences.en: So, they are comparing apples and oranges here.
sentences.cn: Jadi, mereka membandingkan apel dan jeruk (hal yang sangat berbeda).
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (they are comparing apples and oranges here)
sentences.analysis: compare apples and oranges adalah idiom yang berarti 'membandingkan dua hal yang sangat berbeda'.

sentences.en: If you order federal regulators to stop being strict on crypto companies, and then let's put up that circ...
sentences.cn: Jika Anda memerintahkan regulator federal untuk berhenti bersikap ketat terhadap perusahaan crypto, lalu mari kita ajukan itu...
sentences.structure: Klausa kondisional (If you order federal regulators to stop being strict on crypto companies) + kalimat imperatif (and then let's put up that circ...)
sentences.analysis: order sb. to do sth. berarti 'memerintahkan seseorang untuk melakukan sesuatu'; stop being strict on berarti 'berhenti bersikap ketat terhadap'; circ mungkin singkatan dari circular atau circumstance, tetapi teks asli tidak lengkap.

topics.title: Kontroversi Pengungkapan Keuangan Trump dan Konflik Kepentingan
topics.content: Laporan pengungkapan keuangan Trump 2026 menunjukkan ia memperoleh lebih dari $1 miliar melalui cryptocurrency (crypto), barang bermerek (Trump-branded products), dll., memicu kontroversi tentang presiden yang menggunakan jabatan untuk keuntungan pribadi. Kritikus menyebutnya 'grift' (penipuan), sementara pendukung menekankan transparansi (transparency).

topics.title: Tim AS Lolos ke Babak 16 Besar Piala Dunia
topics.content: Tim nasional sepak bola AS menang 2-0 di Piala Dunia 2026, lolos ke babak 16 besar (Round of 16). Acara tersebut melaporkan reaksi antusias penggemar, dengan mengatakan 'World Cup dream still very much alive'.
topics.keywords: World Cup · Round of 16 · Team USA

topics.title: Rumor Pernikahan Taylor Swift dan Travis Kelce
topics.content: Acara tersebut menyebutkan bahwa penyanyi pop Taylor Swift dan bintang NFL Travis Kelce dikabarkan akan menikah akhir pekan ini di New York. Topik ini merupakan berita hiburan yang menarik perhatian luas.
topics.keywords: Taylor Swift · Travis Kelce · marriage rumor

topics.title: Insiden Lamaran di Empire State Building
topics.content: Dua pemanjat pemberani (daring climbers) naik ke puncak Empire State Building untuk melamar, lalu ditangkap. Acara tersebut menggambarkan peristiwa ini sebagai 'sky-high proposal'.

quiz.question:
Berdasarkan teks, apa yang dimaksud dengan 'side hustle' dalam konteks ini?
Teks: 'Then there are the side hustles. That's $4 million for Trump-branded watches.'
options: B. Pekerjaan sampingan atau paruh waktu
quiz.explanation: side hustle berarti pekerjaan sampingan atau paruh waktu, di sini merujuk pada sumber pendapatan tambahan seperti jam tangan bermerek Trump.

quiz.question:
原文中 'grifty' 一词的含义是什么？
原文：'It's so grifty. I'm not going to lie. It's grifty.'
quiz.explanation: grifty 意为欺诈性的、骗钱的，用于批评特朗普的赚钱方式。

quiz.question:
短语 'apples and oranges' 在文中的意思是什么？
原文：'they are comparing apples and oranges here.'
quiz.explanation: apples and oranges 是习语，指风马牛不相及的事物，强调无法比较。

quiz.question: 根据对话，Mike Dubke 认为特朗普家族为何公开财务信息？
quiz.explanation: Dubke 说 'if we do everything out in the open... that's transparency'，认为公开是为了展示透明度。

quiz.question: Meghan Hays 对特朗普赚钱的主要批评是什么？
options: B. 他以美国人民为代价获利
quiz.explanation: Hays 说 'get richer at the expense of the American people'，批评他牺牲民众利益。

quiz.question: Which two events were mentioned in the program as other news topics?
options: A. World Cup and marriage rumors
D. Stock market and oil prices
quiz.explanation: The program reported on the US team's World Cup qualification and Taylor Swift's marriage rumors.
